title: Objections to the list of goods for which customs duties will be suspended in 2024
bodyHtml:
As known, the suspension of customs duties for industrial products that our industry needs as raw materials and semi-finished products is determined through negotiations at meetings attended by our country's representatives and the European Commission twice a year, on January 1 and July 1, respectively. For the products that cannot meet the production demand, quota applications are made.

In this context, the list of goods requested by EU or Turkish companies for the suspension of customs duties or the application of tariff quotas, starting from 01/01/2024, is available in the link below. Objections to these products must be submitted to the Ministry by May 05, 2023, at the latest.

For the applications to be processed, it is necessary to obtain a document registration number from the Ministry of Trade by the aforementioned date at the latest. Forms related to objections can be accessed at https://www.ticaret.gov.tr/ithalat/askiya-alma-ve-tarife-kontenjani/askiya-alma-sistemi.

Click for the 2024/1 Suspension list

Note: For detailed information about the suspension system, Import Communiqué No. 2022/18 can be examined. Additionally, since the products in the list are specially defined by the applicant companies, it is important to apply by examining the product definitions rather than  the CN Code or GTIP, in case  there is a production that meets the demand.
